education.description: Projects: Full-Stack Web Application, REST API Development, Database Design
coursework: Relevant coursework: Data Structures & Algorithms, Operating Systems, Databases, Computer Networks, Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Computer Architecture, Discrete Mathematics, and Probability & Statistics.

Relevant coursework: Advanced Algorithms, Distributed Systems, Advanced Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Big Data Analytics, Cloud Computing, Advanced Database Systems, Cybersecurity, Parallel Computing, Research Methods
Thesis: Research and Development of a Scalable AI, Data-Intensive, or Distributed Computing System.

workExperience.title: Senior Software Engineer
workExperience.description:
Delivered end-to-end software solutions for diverse clients, designing scalable back-end architectures, RESTful APIs, and data-driven applications while leveraging cloud platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP) and containerization (Docker/Kubernetes).

Led full project lifecycles from requirements gathering to deployment, developed web and automation solutions (Python, Node.js, JavaScript), optimized databases (SQL/NoSQL), implemented CI/CD pipelines, ensured security best practices, and provided technical consulting across system design, performance optimization, and digital transformation initiatives.

workExperience.title: Senior Software Engineer
workExperience.description:
Designed and developed scalable enterprise applications, implemented RESTful APIs and microservices architectures, collaborated in Agile/Scrum teams, optimized database performance, integrated cloud services (AWS/Azure), ensured code quality through unit and integration testing, and contributed to CI/CD pipelines for automated deployment.

Gathered and analyzed business requirements with stakeholders, translated functional specifications into technical solutions, performed code reviews and refactoring to improve maintainability, monitored application performance in production environments, resolved critical incidents, and mentored junior developers while ensuring compliance with security and industry best practices.

personal.name: Alejandro Moral Aranda
personal.about: Senior Software Engineer with expertise in back-end development, microservices architecture, and cloud computing.

projects.title: E-Commerce Microservices Platform
projects.description: Architected and developed a scalable e-commerce platform using microservices architecture with Spring Boot and Node.js. Implemented API Gateway, service discovery with Eureka, distributed tracing with Zipkin, and event-driven communication using RabbitMQ. Deployed on AWS ECS with auto-scaling capabilities handling 100k+ daily transactions.

projects.title: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard API
projects.description: Built high-performance REST API using FastAPI and PostgreSQL for real-time analytics dashboard. Implemented Redis caching layer reducing query times by 80%, designed efficient database schemas with complex aggregations, and integrated WebSocket connections for live data streaming. Handles 10M+ events per day with sub-100ms response times.

projects.title: Multi-Tenant SaaS Backend Infrastructure
projects.description: Designed and deployed multi-tenant SaaS infrastructure on Kubernetes with tenant isolation, automated CI/CD pipelines using GitLab CI, and comprehensive monitoring with Prometheus/Grafana. Implemented JWT-based authentication, rate limiting, and audit logging. Reduced deployment time by 70% and achieved 99.9% uptime.

projects.title: Payment Processing Gateway
projects.description: Developed secure payment gateway integrating multiple payment providers (Stripe, PayPal, Bank transfers). Implemented idempotency keys, webhook handling, retry mechanisms with exponential backoff, and PCI-DSS compliant data handling. Built comprehensive reconciliation system processing $5M+ monthly transactions with 99.99% accuracy.

projects.title: Distributed Task Scheduler
projects.description: Created distributed task scheduling system using Go and etcd for coordination. Implemented leader election, task sharding across workers, failure recovery, and priority queues. System processes 500k+ scheduled jobs daily with automatic failover and horizontal scaling capabilities. Reduced infrastructure costs by 40% through efficient resource utilization.

projects.title: API Rate Limiting & Throttling Service
projects.description: Built centralized rate limiting service using Redis and Lua scripts supporting multiple algorithms (token bucket, sliding window, fixed window). Integrated with Kong API Gateway serving 1B+ API requests monthly. Implemented dynamic rate limit adjustments based on customer tiers and real-time monitoring dashboard for API usage analytics.
